content: P10 'live execution visualization' (issue #65) shipped all THREE sub-features in one PR (console redesign + otto-tail + done card) via subagent-driven development on branch feat/p10-live-execution-visualization, using the LIGHT mechanisms the maintainer chose: append-mode console (NOT a full-screen TUI redraw) + bundle-POLLING tail (NOT an HTTP server). Architecture spine: ONE pure shared model so the three surfaces never drift into three renderers. SLICE MAP (6 tasks): (1) plan-progress.ts — pure `parsePlanProgress(md): {checked,total,items}` counting GitHub task-list checkboxes via /^\s*[-*]\s+\[( |x|X)\]\s+(.*)$/gm (module-level regex, reset lastIndex each call; returns a FRESH zero-state object each call, NOT a shared EMPTY ref — that was a review fix). (2) run-view.ts — `RunView` (runId, bin, mode, status running|done|failed, iterationsDone/Total, costUsd, tokenUsage:TokenUsage [must be the full object, not a flat number — review fix — so formatTokenUsage works], elapsedMs null-not-NaN like eval.ts, exitReason, nextAction, stages[{iteration,stage,isError}], planProgress?), `buildRunView(manifest,stages,opts?)` (status failed when exitReason ∈ {'done with failures','stopped (error)'}), `formatDoneCard(view)` (the P10 done card — FIRST line MUST contain the greppable `Otto <reason> · N iteration(s) · $<cost.toFixed(2)>` because loop.test.ts greps it), `formatLiveTree(view)` (status header + iteration→stage tree + running totals). (3) loop.ts summarize() now renders formatDoneCard (keeps the greppable line + the `→ next:` + deferred-followups lines + runtime/tokens line after the card); buildRunView is fed an in-memory `stageLog` array of {iteration,stage,isError} (cast `as unknown as StageRecord[]` — buildRunView only reads those 3 fields; follow-up: widen the param to Pick<StageRecord,...> to drop the cast). REQUIRED extraction: NEW next-action.ts holds NEXT_ACTION map + nextActionFor (moved out of loop.ts) to BREAK the loop↔run-view import cycle — run-view imports from next-action, loop re-exports nextActionFor from next-action. (4) console-ui.ts — `EventSink {setStage(iteration,stage); onEvent(ev:StreamJson)}` with `VerboseSink` (owns its own toolMap, onEvent→renderEvent — reproduces today's firehose byte-for-byte) and quiet `ConsoleUi` (classifies tool events: Edit/Write→'edited <path>', Bash `git commit`→'committed: <subject>', Bash test/typecheck runner regex→pass/fail summarized from the PAIRED tool_result, is_error→'<tool> failed'; SUPPRESSES assistant text/thinking and Read/Glob/Grep; setStage prints `── iter N · <stage> ──`; does NOT print cost/tokens — the loop's accountStage already does). runner.ts:711 non-codex branch is now `(options.sink ?? new VerboseSink()).onEvent(parsed)` resolved once — a no-sink runStage is byte-identical to before; codex path + JSON parse + appendFileSync(logFd) + parseStreamEvent/result settle + rate-limit/resetsAt are ALL untouched (do not change them). `sink` added to RunStageOptions, threaded loop→stage-exec→runStage. loop builds ONE sink per run, QUIET (ConsoleUi) by DEFAULT, VerboseSink when LoopOptions.verbose. Panel sub-stages stay on the default VerboseSink (firehose). exported `cyan` from stream-render.ts for console-ui. (5) --verbose flag: cli-help.ts parseFlags→flags.verbose, shown by --print-config, run-bin.ts threads into runLoop({verbose}); otto-tail: tail.ts `runTail(argv, deps:TailDeps)` MIRRORS inspect.ts runInspect (<run-id>|latest via listRunIds, unknown-id/no-runs→err+exit1) and POLLS the bundle — TailDeps has injectable `sleep`/`maxPolls`/`readManifest` so tests NEVER real-sleep and the loop has a dual exit (finishedAt set OR maxPolls cap → cannot hang); renders formatLiveTree while running, formatDoneCard once finalized; NEW apps/cli/bin/otto-tail.js (mirrors otto-inspect.js) + package.json bin entry; runTail/TailDeps exported. NOTE: `otto-watch` is the EXISTING ghafk issue-watching daemon — the run-attach surface is named `otto-tail` to avoid the collision. (6) LEARNINGS bullet + this record. GOTCHA that bit during execution: a subagent committed Task 4 to a STRAY branch (feat/console-ui-sink) off the same parent — recovered by `git merge --ff-only` onto the feature branch (it was a linear descendant) then deleted the stray. Verified: full `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test && pnpm test` green (core 1115, root 79). DEFERRED (named in plan): full-screen TUI redraw; HTML/markdown live page; a persisted per-action event log so otto-tail can show fine-grained actions (today it shows bundle-level stage/total/plan progress); router decision inline in the quiet console.
